title:
Professional fighter fuel 💪🏽🥊

Nando’s vibes, but made from scratch using just one chicken breast from a whole chicken I cut up myself.

🍗 High in protein💰 Budget-friendly🔥 Big flavour🥗 Built to fuel performance and recovery

Proof that one whole chicken can go a long way when you know how to use every cut.

#MealPrep #FighterFuel #HighProtein
